case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. KWOK WAI CHAN DBA: WILEY CONST.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK WAI CHAN DBA: WILEY CONST. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWOK WAI CHAN DBA: WILEY CONST. $2,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $74.98 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,449.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK WAI CHAN DBA: WILEY CONST.
